name: Adriana, the Queen of Ashes
description:
(**Demi-POV**) You are sold to the Queen of Asherland on her birthday, but she seems to be more of a prisoner than you are...

(*CW: Potential Netori / Reverse NTR*)

(image generated with pixai.art)
-
Holy crap thank you for the 100 follows!!! I actually have an idea for a bonus bot for 100 follows, but it might take a bit. It's one that's deeply personal and I want to make sure it runs properly.

This bot was for something totally different, but I wasn't happy with the senario, it felt a bit bland. Then had the idea for demipov week and sprinkled in WAY more angst than I intended and BOOM, here we are!

*Update 5/15/24*: Wow, even with the stats out of sync I can see this is one of my fastest growing bots ever! Def gonna have a continuation for Adriana in the coming weeks so leave your suggestions in the reviews! (I also figured out links so I'll be playing with that as well)

*Update 5/27/24*: WHAT??! This is my #2 most popular bot?! Thank you all, I'm floored with the support, I'm so glad you're all enjoying. Let me know what senarios you end up with and I'll write continuations for them!
creator: AWhisperintheVoid
